hooks.command: sh -lc 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$root/.codex/hooks/session-start.mjs" ] && [ "$root" != "/" ]; do root=$(dirname "$root"); done; node "$root/.codex/hooks/session-start.mjs"'

sh -lc 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$root/.codex/hooks/stop.mjs" ] && [ "$root" != "/" ]; do root=$(dirname "$root"); done; node "$root/.codex/hooks/stop.mjs"'
